Name: PodcastorAI
Tagline: Your AI twin hosts your video podcast
Topics: Social Media, Marketing, YouTube, OpenAI Day
Description: Create studio-quality video podcasts from scripts, links, PDFs, or ideas — with AI hosts, natural voices, and your digital twin. Podcastor handles production and puts you on screen, turning hours of recording and editing into a finished video podcast in around 15 minutes. Create solo or two-host episodes and get a publish-ready video without cameras or a production team. Already have an audio episode? Upload it and transform it into a video podcast with your voice and AI avatar.

Name: PromptQL
Tagline: Multiplayer AI that replaces Slack
Topics: Productivity, SaaS, Artificial Intelligence, OpenAI Day
Description: Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.

Name: Teable 3.0
Tagline: AI Spreadsheet for Business
Topics: Productivity, Spreadsheets, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, OpenAI Day
Description: Turn your business data into AI workflows and custom apps. Connect any system, migrate any data, and build anything that fits your business 100%.

Name: CrawlRaven
Tagline: SEO Hub for GSC + GA4 + a 200-point crawl
Topics: Marketing, SEO, Search, OpenAI Day
Description: Connect Google Search Console, Google Analytics, import your Ahrefs or Semrush lists, and crawl your site on 200-point technical SEO Audit. CrawlRaven joins all four and hands back a ranked plan: what to write, what to update, what to fix first.

Name: Wispro
Tagline: Stop typing, start talking, get perfectly written text
Topics: Productivity, Artificial Intelligence, Audio, OpenAI Day
Description: Wispro turns your voice into writing, instantly. Just talk, messy or unfiltered, and Wispro pastes clean, ready-to-use text directly into whatever you're working on. It adapts to how you think, not just how you speak. Basic Mode captures every word exactly as said. Smart Mode cuts filler words and rambling, formatting it into polished prose. Command Mode turns a spoken instruction into finished writing, emails, replies, whole drafts, on the spot. One voice. Three ways to write.

Name: OpenCode Superapp
Tagline: The power of Codex with local, self-hosted models and voice
Topics: Productivity, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, OpenAI Day
Description: OpenCode Superapp brings the agentic power of Codex to the models and infrastructure you choose. Run cloud, local, or self-hosted models in a native workspace where agents understand your projects, work with files, Git, and terminals, speak with you through voice, and operate Mac apps through supervised Computer Use. Private by design and extensible through skills and MCPs, it gives you capable agents without giving up model choice or control. Built from the ground up with Codex and GPT-5.6.

Name: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
Tagline: Automated documentation for developers, users, and AI Tools
Topics: Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, OpenAI Day
Description: Now in Beta: Public Sites! Create auto-generated, public-facing help centers and knowledgebases at https://moxiedocs.app. Features rich layouts, white-labelling, full search, and no vendor lock-in. Integrates directly with Changelog! Example: https://docs.moxiedocs.app Also shipped: Webhooks & Slack integration for indexing/PR alerts UI/UX pagination & bulk action improvements DB/infrastructure upgrades for faster loading Continued improvements on document generation quality

Name: Squishy
Tagline: the screen time pet you keep alive with someone
Topics: iOS, Chrome Extensions, Productivity
Description: Squishy is an app and website blocker with a mascot whose happiness follows your choices. Focus helps it recover. Opening blocked apps or sites drains it. Share one Squishy with a partner, friend, or family member, and both of you contribute to the same happiness bar while browsing details stay private. One subscription covers the owner and one invited partner, with sync across iPhone, iPad, Android, and Chrome.

Name: Quaso
Tagline: AI automation agent to get stuff done across apps or browser
Topics: Productivity, Artificial Intelligence, No-Code
Description: Quaso turns your busywork into automation across all of your apps and the open web. Simply prompt what needs to get done and it builds and sets it up for you. Connects to 3000+ integrations (Gmail, Slack, Linear, Stripe, etc.) and picks up a real browser when there's no native API. Runs on schedules, triggers, and on demand. Fork templates or save any thread as your own reusable skill. Tag @Quaso in Slack so your whole team can put it to work. Just relax and get stuff done.

Name: Blaxel Agent Drive
Tagline: A shared filesystem for AI agents
Topics: Software Engineering, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence
Description: Mount one distributed filesystem across multiple sandboxes with concurrent read-write access. Agents can share files, tool outputs, datasets, and context through a normal filesystem path.

Name: Cosyra 2.0
Tagline: A cloud workspace for coding agents from your phone
Topics: Productivity, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence
Description: Cosyra gives you a persistent workspace for cloud agents. Your repos, branches, files, dependencies, terminals, and agent work stay together. Open it from your phone and keep building without leaving a laptop awake.

Name: Megaphone
Tagline: Open-source Mac dictation App that's 100% on-device
Topics: Productivity, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, Apple, OpenAI Day
Description: Hold Fn, speak, and Megaphone types clean text into any Mac app. Apple’s SpeechAnalyzer transcribes as you talk, while on-device Foundation Models remove fillers, fix self-corrections, adapt to app context, and power inline voice commands. No account, API key, subscription, or server. Free, MIT-licensed, and native to Apple silicon Macs running macOS 26.

Name: Basedash Developer Platform
Tagline: Ship AI-powered analytics in your product, fast
Topics: Artificial Intelligence, Data & Analytics, Business Intelligence, OpenAI Day
Description: Basedash is the AI analytics platform — chat with an AI data analyst, automatic daily insights, automations, and dashboards. Now all of it is available through the API. Power your product's customer-facing analytics with a fully custom UI, or extend your internal BI in ways no tool anticipated. Send a question, stream the answer, render the chart — every query scoped to the right customer. Ranked #1 on BI Bench and powered by GPT-5.6. The AI data analyst, now yours to build on.

Name: RunEvr
Tagline: Agentic project management environment for creatives
Topics: Task Management, SaaS, Chat rooms, OpenAI Day
Description: One AI-powered workspace where your projects, conversations, reviews, and creative work stay connected. Every tool switch interrupts creative thinking, scatters context, and adds unnecessary cognitive load. RunEvr is built to keep your entire creative workflow in one place, helping teams stay focused, collaborate naturally, and create without losing momentum.

Name: AskCodi
Tagline: Orchestrate agents at scale while reducing cost
Topics: Mac, Productivity, Artificial Intelligence, OpenAI Day
Description: Tell Codi what you want to build. It writes the plan, runs AI agents in parallel across all your projects, and picks the cheapest model that can do each task, so you ship more and spend less. When you add a project it writes the charter and task list itself, and only pulls you in when a decision needs you, through one inbox.

Name: Vevey
Tagline: A game development tutor now on iOS
Topics: Education, Artificial Intelligence, Games, OpenAI Day
Description: Meet Matti, an AI tutor that helps you bring your game ideas to life. We've worked on popular games like https://www.landmarkr.app, and are providing a platform for others to build their own. Create without limits, get instruction on 2D & 3D projects, and even create daily games and puzzles like Landmarkr and Wordle via Game Guides. We'd love to hear from you!

Name: Basement
Tagline: Shopping browser with agentic checkout
Topics: Artificial Intelligence, E-Commerce, OpenAI Day
Description: Basement is now a shopping browser. Today we launch agentic checkout: your AI shopper finds the best price across the web and buys it for you. Every purchase runs on a single-use card scoped to one order, so your real card is never exposed and nothing goes beyond the budget you set. Every payment lands in one place. Powered by Crossmint. It knows what you like. Now it can buy it. Live on iOS and Chrome.

Name: AgentLoop
Tagline: Starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle
Topics: Open Source, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, OpenAI Day
Description: Unlike long-running agent chats, AgentLoop starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle. Set the goal and GUIDELINES.md rubric once; workers build, critics test, and failures become concrete fix notes for the next clean context. Project files carry the memory. Runs stay local, sandboxed, observable, and cancellable from a live dashboard, with ChatGPT control through MCP. Polish mode can continue beyond PASS until the critic says SHIP. Open source and zero-dependency Node.js.

Name: Speakworld
Tagline: Learn languages by exploring worlds and talking to locals.
Topics: Languages, Games, OpenAI Day
Description: Speakworld — learn Hindi, Japanese and Spanish through playable journeys.

Name: valv
Tagline: Your database, safe for agents to query
Topics: SaaS, Artificial Intelligence, Data & Analytics, OpenAI Day
Description: Connect Postgres, MySQL, ClickHouse and PostHog once. Scope each role down to the row. Your team's agents work on live data and never see more than you allow.
